title: The Mini Moon of Earth You Didn't Know About

scenes.text: Did you know Earth has a 'mini-moon' that orbits us occasionally?
This mini-moon, also called a temporary satellite, orbits Earth for a short time before leaving.
These mini-moons can range from the size of a car to larger than a home.
It's like finding a new friend in space that only visits for a while!
scenes.label: SPACE FRIEND

scenes.text: Follow for daily science that blows your mind.

description: Earth has a 'mini-moon' that orbits us before disappearing into space. What a cosmic surprise! Follow for more incredible discoveries!
